Verification System Implementation
==================================

.. The format is inspired by "https://docs.ros.org/en/jazzy/Tutorials/Beginner-Client-Libraries/Writing-A-Simple-Cpp-Publisher-And-Subscriber.html"

The design detail and the code examination of each Node in the Verification System are
explained here.
